doctrine_enforcement_lines: Implementation is not stale by itself. Tickets become stale.
Apply maximum concrete capability within the approved scope of each ticket.

stale_risks_controlled: exact concrete files assigned
dependency FFET ids assigned
runtime MCR uses validation evidence, not documentation only
stop conditions include missing source/schema/API/business decisions
execution flags remain false until human gate
